daily_target_model: 20 enriched contacts per day. DEFAULT: pull all 20 from the single top account. Large enterprise accounts (Walmart, DHL, P&G, Sysco, etc.) have hundreds of Director+/VP Ops, Supply Chain, Logistics, Distribution, Fulfillment people, so 20 should come from ONE account on the first pass. Go DEEP before going wide: broaden the ICP title set and PAGINATE the Clay search (request multiple pages, per_page up to 100) until you have 20 Director+ ICP-qualified, US-based, verified-email contacts at that account. Only spill into the next hopper account if the current account is genuinely exhausted of qualified ICP contacts before reaching 20 (true for small accounts like City Furniture, not for enterprises). Each account is gated/staged separately by its verdict (STRIKE -> approve, NURTURE/QUALIFY -> auto).
sequence_cadence: Day 1: manual email (bespoke first touch) + call + LinkedIn connection request

apollo_custom_fields.Gather_Email_Subject: day-1 email subject (template Subject = this merge var)
apollo_custom_fields.Gather_Email_Body: day-1 bespoke email body (template Body = this merge var; auto_email sends it after Peter's review)
apollo_custom_fields.Gather_Script: 30-45s script, used in call step notes (day 1/3/8) and the day-5 LinkedIn video step

import_csv.how: Each run writes apollo-import.csv next to apollo-upload.csv. Peter imports it in Apollo (Import -> match on email -> map Gather_* columns to the custom fields). One-time field/template setup is in hopper/APOLLO_SETUP.md.

notes: Apollo add_contact_ids requires explicit human confirmation and never auto-fires unattended. So the Driver PREPARES (research, source, enrich, content, create contacts in Apollo) and STAGES enrollment; Peter one-tap confirms the add-to-sequence. STRIKE enrolls paused for review; NURTURE/QUALIFY may enroll active (the day-1 manual email still gates the first send on Peter, so active never sprays touch 1).
